title: Personalized (actionable) notifications for your monday.com items in Slack

posts.author: asharma (Ankur Sharma - Upscale (Part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

Stay on top of your deliverables and deadlines with Personal Notifications, the newest feature for our Integrate Plus for monday.com and Slack app.

With Personal Notifications, you can filter out the noise, cut the clutter, and focus only on updates relevant to you, such as:

  • When an item is assigned (or unassigned) to you
  • When an update is made to an assigned or subscribed item or subitem
  • Status changes to an assigned or subscribed item or subitem

Interested to see how it works? Watch our quick 1-min demo.
